name: Mini Apple Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten each biscuit to a 3-4 inch circle using a rolling pin.
2. Combine the apple, raisins, sugar, and cinnamon in a tablespoon on each biscuit.
3. Dot with margarine.
4. Bring up the sides of the biscuit to enclose the filling and pinch to seal.
5. Place in ungreased muffin cups.
6. Bake at 375°F for 11-13 minutes or until golden brown.
